summary: Tiers/Archon/metrics re-fetched live, 0 tier moves; WCL rdps still 500 (5 cuts unreachable, 3 raw series landed); no new PTR build; creator transcripts IP-blocked.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl and parsed from table.tier-list rows; era-verified Midnight/12.0.7/Devourer. 80 spec-tier assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched (spell-icon alts filtered). 0 tier moves vs HEAD — re-verified live, stable.

Both pages fetched live and parsed from tier__tier data-original-title blocks; era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 specs (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream — absence, not error); M+ 40 specs (S tier empty upstream, dungeon-difficulty list excluded via roster matching). 0 moves vs HEAD.

All 6 pages fetched via r.jina.ai (mplus-tank needed a cache-opt-out retry) and parsed from the numbered ranking lists; era-verified Midnight Season 1. 40+40 specs matched; the 'Subtlety Rogue B Tier)' missing-open-paren render bug handled leniently. 0 moves vs HEAD.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection; 80 rows matched roster, 0 unmatched; upstream lastUpdated 2026-07-16T12:00Z. 0 tier moves vs HEAD. specRankingsSection numbers re-merged (160 rows: 95th pct DPS/HPS, M+ score, Popularity) — 0 value changes vs stored (upstream snapshot unchanged since last run).

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses + 8 M+ dungeons across all 3 roles (51 pages, throughput for raid / score for M+); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched, 0 changed vs stored; asOf already 2026-07-17.
40 rows parsed from the survivability tierList across all 3 raid pages and re-merged via apply-metrics survivability key; 0 tier moves vs HEAD — stable.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) fetched via r.jina.ai; Rankings-table Tier column parsed and cross-checked against the visible ckmeans tier list (DPS S3/A3/B5/C9/D7 — 0 mismatches); 40 specs. 0 moves vs HEAD. Raid pages re-checked: still '0 records' upstream — left unranked.

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-17T11:55:03Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 — the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) re-paginated each DPS dummy's full metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; per-encounter players 1T:2000 2T:160 3T:111 5T:1500). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-17.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 with players: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar and Ula'tek 0 — untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-17.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 594-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-17.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET and parsed for the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling; era-verified Midnight Season 1 (12.1 hits were SVG coords, no season flip). 0 value changes vs stored — confirmed stable, not a stale skip.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 + ptr:0 confirmed on every chart; best-build DPS at counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design. 0 target changes vs stored.

Nightly MID1_Raid report re-fetched (SimulationCraft 1205-01, World of Warcraft 12.0.7.68453 Live, hotfix 2026-07-13 — era-verified, no season flip). 26/26 DPS specs parsed as best variant per spec from the player DPS headers; 0 value deltas vs HEAD (nightly build unchanged since last fetch). Augmentation excluded by design.
Period 1072 MID1 (unchanged period; era-verified) parsed from /period/latest 'Spec representation in top keys'; 40/40 specs, sum 100.2%. 0 value changes vs stored — confirmed stable.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14) under already-logged build #14 — NO new forum build. RSS newest 12.1 items are 07-16 or older, all prior-triaged (07-16 Class Tuning Hotfixes = PTR hotfixes with no forum post, not a build; 07-16 Holy Paladin tier-set review = spec already has a writeup, tuning already in build #14; 07-16 M+ mob-count tooltip = not tuning). ptr-builds.json unchanged; zone-54/52/56 are evidence-only (rdps-broken, see WCL rows).

All 25 unique creator YouTube RSS feeds fetched live (feeds fresh — newest uploads 07-17 Kalamazi/Supatease, 07-16 several — all already in the seen-set). No genuinely-new videos since the last run: newest UNSEEN item is 2026-06-30, i.e. pre-log-window back-catalog, nothing newer than the last run's triage. Transcripts UNREACHABLE — yt-dlp 'Sign in to confirm you're not a bot' (verified once on vK-qyvXOVYM, not hammered) — 0 takes / 0 metaNotes distilled. izen (general creator) newest is 07-15, already seen and prior-verified against build #14; no new build lead. Prior pending queue carries forward for local transcript catch-up.
